heading: View MongoDB Search Indexes
body:
To describe the specified search index for the specified deployment using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas deployments search indexes describe [indexId] [options]

```

To list all search indexes for the specified deployment using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas deployments search indexes list [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas deployments search indexes describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-deployments-search-indexes-describe) and
[atlas deployments search indexes list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-deployments-search-indexes-list).
